raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "Senator Brian W. Jones proposes legislation to compassionately clear homeless encampments near sensitive community areas like schools and parks.",
    "The proposed Senate Bill 31 requires a 72-hour warning before an encampment sweep to allow homeless individuals to seek alternatives.",
    "Senate Bill 31 mandates that enforcement officers provide information on available sleeping alternatives, mental health services, and shelters to homeless individuals during encampment sweeps.",
    "Senator Brian W. Jones introduces Senate Bill 32 and Special Session Senate Billx1 1 to suspend state gas taxes and fees, aiming to reduce gas prices by $1 per gallon.",
    "Suspending the gas tax has garnered bipartisan support across various states in the United States.",
    "President Biden has publicly supported the suspension of state gas taxes."
